title: Mark ADR phases in status
goal: In the mini status overview, flag each phase that carries a decision record (ADR) with a compact, TTY-safe marker, gathered via a single readdir of .mini/decisions/ (no per-phase JSON reads) and exposed as hasDecision in --json. Add a shared listDecisionPhaseIds helper to decisionStore.

steps.title: listDecisionPhaseIds helper in decisionStore
steps.detail: readdir .mini/decisions/ once, parse phase-*.md filenames back to numeric ids -> Set<number>; returns an empty set when the dir is missing (tolerant). Unit-tested in decisionStore.test.ts.

steps.title: Read the ADR id set once in status()
steps.detail: status() does a single listDecisionPhaseIds(cwd) alongside the existing loads; the set is threaded to both the overview renderer and the JSON builder, with no per-phase reads.

steps.title: Render a compact ADR marker in the overview
steps.detail: printPhase shows a dim, TTY-safe tag on the line of every phase whose id is in the set; verified by an updated status overview test.

steps.title: Expose hasDecision in --json
steps.detail: add hasDecision:boolean to StatusJsonPhase; buildStatusJson takes the id set and sets it per phase; covered by a buildStatusJson test.

steps.title: Update docs for the ADR marker
steps.detail: mention the ADR marker in docs/ (status) and README where the status output is described.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 129: Mark ADR phases in status
